title: Tons Of Tunnels
description: Adds tunnels based off the miner's dream from Orespawn
body:
Tons Of Tunnels is a mod based on the miner's dream from popular mod Orespawn



It Behaves vary similarly to the miner's dream by deleting stone, dirt, gravel, netherrack, andesite, granite, and diorite in a long tunnel



There are 6 types of tunnels, one for each tier in vanilla Minecraft. (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)



Tiers 1-4 dig a 3x3 tunnel that is as long as the tools durability divided by 9 rounded up

Diamond and netherite tunnels dig a 7x5 tunnel that is as long as the tools durability divided by 35



It is recommended to up your gamma with this mod but if you even if you don't you will get night vision for 3 second when you use a tunnel

Jei is also recommended but the crafting recipes with be included in the images tab
